This fits B3 to B5 into the virial expansion since maxPower is set to 3.
===== Virial Coefficients for Hertzian Microgels =====

Dry volume fraction range: phi0_min = 1.0E-4, phi0_max = 0.0029999999999999988

===== Virial Coefficients in PHI0-SPACE =====
